steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The crucial signal is that the 2022 paper's justification—that evidence was lacking both for and against antigravity—is directly contradicted by the 2023 findings of experimental evidence against it.

steps.title: Match to the main idea
steps.content: Choice B captures this contradiction by explaining the consequence: theorists were justified before 2023, but the evidence now makes their rationale inapplicable. The other choices misread the passage—A assumes an unstated causal relationship, C misconstrues the 2022 paper's position, and D invents unsupported claims. That matches choice B — B is correct.
